_meta.method: Claude Code research agent (general-purpose) — multi-network web crawl across Kwan Um Czech Republic (kwanumzen.cz, kwanumeurope.org), Buddhovo sezení / Sandō Kaisen network (zenkaisen.cz), Dojo V Proudu (zazen.cz), Sōtō Zen ČR (sotozen.cz), Plum Village Czech Republic, Sanbō Zen Praha references, and Centrum Lotus directory.
_meta.coverageEstimate: ~70-80% of an estimated 12-18 active Zen practice places in Czech Republic. Strong on Kwan Um and Kaisen networks. Weaker on small Sōtō zazenkais and any Sanbō Zen Praha branch (sanbo.cz unreachable at collection).
knownGaps: sanbo.cz returned ECONNREFUSED — Sanbō Zen Praha presence cannot be independently verified.
iriz.hanazono.ac.jp (Japanese Zen centers worldwide directory) returned cert error — historical CZ list not cross-checked.
Plum Village Czech Republic Facebook page is referenced but no formal directory of Czech sanghas was located.
Possible additional Soto Zen ČR (Sōtōshū-affiliated) groups beyond Kaisen lineage not enumerated.

places.name: Dojo V Proudu (Soto Zen Praha)
places.notes: Open Sōtō Zen group practicing zazen Mon/Tue/Thu at Lotus Center; info@zazen.cz, +420 774 223 606.

places.name: Myogenji (Centrum Praha — Sandō Kaisen)
places.notes: Buddha sitting Mondays 7 p.m.; part of Buddhovo sezení z. s. (Master Sandō Kaisen network).

places.name: Mushinji (Centrum Plzeň — Sandō Kaisen)
places.notes: Teacher Sei Yu Debailly; Plzeň Kaisen dojo.

places.name: Centrum Kladno (Sandō Kaisen)
places.notes: Kladno group, Buddhovo sezení z. s.

places.name: Centrum Oko Lesa (Sandō Kaisen — retreat)
places.notes: Buddhovo sezení retreat center; specific city not given on directory page.

places.name: Pražský Zenový Centrum Kvan Um (Praha)
places.notes: Hlavní český Kwan Um center; kwanumpraha@gmail.com; +420 602 796 371 (L. Kohoutová).

places.name: Kwan Um Brno
places.notes: Czech Kwan Um group in Brno.

places.name: Kwan Um Vrážné (Centrum)
places.notes: Rural Kwan Um centre / retreat hub for Czech sangha.

places.name: Plum Village Czech Republic (Praha)
places.lineage: Vietnamese Thiền / Plum Village (Thich Nhat Hanh)
places.notes: Plum Village lay sangha based in Prague; only public presence is the FB page.
